summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JNV Editorial Club iteration 2 with new features. All search functionality, student profiles, and View All toggle logic working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend integration flawless.
passed_tests: Backend: All 29 API tests passed including new search and student profile endpoints
Search functionality: Title, content, author name search in English and Hindi
Clear search button: Properly clears search and reloads results
Student profile pages: /student/:authorName with stats and works display
Author name clickability: From work cards and work detail pages to profiles
View All toggle: Logic working correctly (hidden when ≤6 works, would show when >6)
Category and language filters: Working with search integration
Complete submission workflow: Form submission → admin approval → public display
Admin authentication and approval system: Fully functional
Navigation flows: All page transitions working smoothly
Bilingual support: English and Hindi content display and search
Neo-brutalist design: Consistent styling, fonts, and interaction patterns
Work card interactions: Separate clickable areas for content vs author
Edge cases: Empty search, no results, filter combinations all handled properly

success_percentage.new_features: 100% (search, student profiles, View All toggle logic)
